workshoptitle: Migrate Red Hat Enterprise Linux to Oracle Linux on OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Review the complete migration journey, architecture, prerequisites, and success criteria.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Acquire and Import the RHEL Source Image
tutorials.description: Download an authorized RHEL KVM guest image and import it into OCI.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Launch and Baseline the RHEL Workload
tutorials.description: Launch an actual RHEL source VM, deploy Apache, and capture baseline evidence.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Assess Readiness and Protect the Source
tutorials.description: Run migration readiness checks and create a boot-volume recovery point.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Migrate to Oracle Linux
tutorials.description: Convert RHEL 9.8 to Oracle Linux 9.8 in place and reboot into RHCK.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Manage and Patch Oracle Linux
tutorials.description: Configure OCI management and examine Ksplice live patching.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Validate and Clean Up
tutorials.description: Compare before-and-after evidence, validate the workload, and remove resources.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Review common solutions and options for assistance.
